# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in improving task.airat.top. Contributions of all kinds are welcome, including bug reports, documentation updates, and UI/UX improvements.

## How to Help

- **Report bugs or suggest enhancements** by opening an issue on GitHub. Please include clear reproduction steps, your browser and OS, and any console errors.
- **Improve documentation** by fixing typos or clarifying usage details in the README.
- **Submit pull requests** for React/TypeScript, styling, accessibility, or performance improvements.

## Before You Start

- Read the repository `README.md` to understand project goals and deployment assumptions.
- Keep changes focused. If you have multiple unrelated ideas, open separate pull requests.
- Keep dependencies minimal and avoid unnecessary external services or trackers.

## Development Workflow

1. Fork the repository and clone your fork locally.
2. Create a feature branch that describes your work (for example, `feature/task-filter-improvements`).
3. Make your changes and keep commits scoped and meaningful.
4. Install dependencies with `npm install`.
5. Run local dev server with `npm run dev`.
6. Validate behavior on desktop and mobile widths.
7. Ensure production build works with `npm run build`.
8. Open a pull request against the `main` branch and describe what changed and how you verified it.

## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] The app runs locally with `npm run dev`.
- [ ] Production build succeeds with `npm run build`.
- [ ] No console errors in the browser.
- [ ] Changes are tested in at least one modern browser.
- [ ] UI changes behave well on small screens.
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed.

## Code Style and Standards

- Keep the project lightweight and easy to run locally.
- Use clear, readable React + TypeScript that matches the existing style.
- Prefer accessibility-friendly patterns (keyboard use, contrast, focus states).

## Security and Responsible Disclosure

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do not open a public issue. Instead, email [mail@airat.top](mailto:mail@airat.top) with the details so it can be addressed promptly.

## Questions or Feedback

If you are unsure about anything before contributing, feel free to open a discussion or contact AiratTop at [mail@airat.top](mailto:mail@airat.top). Thanks.
